message:
test(vt-conformance): add 6 scroll region test fixtures and update beads

Add 6 new VT conformance test fixtures for scroll region behavior:
- autowrap_at_region_bottom: verify auto-wrap at bottom of scroll region
  triggers scroll within region only
- cup_decom_clamp_beyond_region: verify CUP with DECOM clamps cursor to
  region boundaries
- decstr_resets_scroll_region: verify DECSTR (soft terminal reset) clears
  scroll region settings
- double_index_at_region_bottom: verify double IND at region bottom
  scrolls correctly
- index_mid_region_no_scroll: verify IND in middle of region moves
  cursor without scrolling
- save_restore_cursor_in_region: verify DECSC/DECRC preserves cursor
  position within scroll region context

Update issue tracker with latest status changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+{
+  "name": "autowrap_at_region_bottom",
+  "description": "Auto-wrap at bottom of scroll region triggers scroll within region only; rows outside are untouched",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b3248421b5b3348431b5b3448441b5b354845 1b5b323b3572 1b5b353b3148 313233343558",
+  "comment": "Fill A-E in rows 0-4. DECSTBM(2,5) → region rows 1-4. CUP(5,1) → (4,0). Write '12345' fills row 4, pending_wrap. Write 'X' triggers wrap → scroll region up. Row 0=A untouched, row 1←C, row 2←D, row 3←12345, row 4=X.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 4, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": "1" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 4, "char": "5" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "X" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "decstr_resets_scroll_region",
+  "description": "DECSTR resets scroll region to full screen; IND at bottom scrolls entire screen",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b3248421b5b3348431b5b3448441b5b354845 1b5b323b3372 1b5b2170 1b5b353b3148 1b44 5a",
+  "comment": "Fill A-E in rows 0-4. DECSTBM(2,3) restricts region. DECSTR soft-resets (region → full screen). CUP(5,1) → (4,0). IND scrolls full screen: row 0←B, row 1←C, row 2←D, row 3←E, row 4←blank. Print 'Z' at (4,0).",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 4, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "Z" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,16 @@
+{
+  "name": "double_index_at_region_bottom",
+  "description": "Two consecutive IND at bottom of scroll region scrolls region twice; rows outside untouched",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b3248421b5b3348431b5b3448441b5b354845 1b5b323b3572 1b5b353b3148 1b44 1b44 5a",
+  "comment": "Fill A-E. DECSTBM(2,5) → region rows 1-4. CUP(5,1) → (4,0). IND → scroll: row 1←C, 2←D, 3←E, 4←blank. IND again → scroll: row 1←D, 2←E, 3←blank, 4←blank. Print 'Z'. Row 0=A untouched.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 4, "col": 1 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "E" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "Z" }
+    ]
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+{
+  "name": "index_mid_region_no_scroll",
+  "description": "IND (ESC D) in middle of scroll region moves cursor down without scrolling",
+  "initial_size": [5, 5],
+  "input_bytes_hex": "411b5b3248421b5b3348431b5b3448441b5b354845 1b5b323b3472 1b5b333b3148 1b44",
+  "comment": "Fill A-E in rows 0-4. DECSTBM(2,4) → region rows 1-3. CUP(3,1) → (2,0) mid-region. IND: row+1=3 < scroll_bottom=4 → cursor moves to (3,0), no scroll.",
+  "expected": {
+    "cursor": { "row": 3, "col": 0 },
+    "cells": [
+      { "row": 0, "col": 0, "char": "A" },
+      { "row": 1, "col": 0, "char": "B" },
+      { "row": 2, "col": 0, "char": "C" },
+      { "row": 3, "col": 0, "char": "D" },
+      { "row": 4, "col": 0, "char": "E" }
+    ]
+  }
+}
